summary: Frontend-only retest completed for natal wheel mobile/desktop interaction regression. Mobile clustered Venus tap now consistently selects Venus, mobile quick-ask correctly routes to /astrologer with Venus focus context, and desktop clustered Venus click still primes dashboard astrologer panel correctly. Additional sanity checks confirmed house and aspect taps still work on mobile.
action_items: No blocking regressions found in requested scope.
Optional: run one additional device-level manual tap pass on real iOS/Android hardware for clustered wheel points.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issues found in reviewed files for this retest scope.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded blueprint test user from /app/tests/seed_ai_users.json; no new seed created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed mobile and desktop dashboard retests against public URL with blueprint account. Mobile Venus selection passed repeatedly (8/8), quick-ask navigated to /astrologer and preserved Venus focus + draft prompt, desktop Venus click preserved focus in dashboard panel. House and aspect tap sanity checks also passed on mobile.
rca of the issue: Previously reported overlap issue was not reproducible in this iteration. Current behavior indicates clustered hit-area separation and responsive target sizing changes are effective for tested viewport (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080).
